name: zyra
description: Local Zyra coding assistant CLI for Cara.

scripts.check: node --check src/zyra-ui.mjs && node --check src/terminal-input.mjs && node --check src/zyra.mjs && node --check src/zyra-memory.mjs && node --check src/memory/zyra-memory-state.mjs && node --check src/memory/zyra-memory-store.mjs && node --check src/memory/zyra-memory-prompts.mjs && node --check src/memory/zyra-memory-runner.mjs && node --check src/memory/zyra-memory-controller.mjs && node --check src/tui/zyra-tui.mjs && node --check src/tui/component-host.mjs && node --check src/tui/render-utils.mjs && node --check src/tui/components/editor.mjs && node --check src/tui/components/message-components.mjs && node --check src/tui/components/static-panels.mjs && node --check scripts/test-zyra-memory.mjs && node scripts/test-zyra-memory.mjs && node scripts/test-zyra-ui-render.mjs && node bin/zyra.mjs doctor
